title: Data Structures Midterm Examination
description: The midterm exam for CS-202 will take place on July 18th at 10:00 AM in Hall A. The syllabus covers Chapters 1 to 5, including trees and graphs.

title: Pending Tuition Fees Alert
description: Dear Aarav Sharma (STU-101), your tuition fee payment of ₹15,000 for the current semester is overdue. Please settle this by July 15th to avoid late registration charges.

title: Lab Assignment 3 Submission
description: Please upload your solutions for Lab 3 (Binary Search Trees implementation) on the student portal before Friday midnight. Late submissions will attract a 10% penalty per day.

title: Annual Inter-Class Cricket Tournament
description: Team registration for the cricket tournament starts today. Interested students from CS-202 should submit their team roster to Coach Rajesh by Tuesday.

title: Academic Warning: Low Attendance
description: Your attendance in CS-202 is currently 62%, which is below the mandatory 75% threshold. Please meet your advisor, Dr. Amit Sharma, to discuss this.

title: Special Makeup Lab Assignment
description: This notice is for Neha Patel (STU-102) only. You are scheduled for a makeup lab session on Physics-II this Saturday at 9:00 AM.

title: Welcome Freshmen: CS-101 Orientation
description: Welcome to the Department of Computer Science. The orientation program will be held online on July 12th. Joining link has been sent to your registered email.

title: Scholarship Renewal Documentation
description: This notice is for Rohan Das (STU-301). Please upload your first-year marksheet on the portal to process your scholarship renewal for next semester.

title: Placement Prep Guest Lecture
description: A guest lecture on 'Acing Technical Coding Interviews' by a senior engineer from Google is scheduled for CS-202 students on July 14th at 2:00 PM in the auditorium.

title: Overdue Book Return Notice
description: Dear Neha Patel (STU-102), the book 'Introduction to Algorithms' borrowed on June 15th is overdue. Please return it or renew it to avoid daily fines.

title: Discrete Mathematics Quiz Postponement
description: Dear CS-101 students, the quiz scheduled for tomorrow is postponed to next Monday due to the department sports meet.

title: Dean's List Congratulatory Note
description: Congratulations Rohan Das (STU-301)! You have been placed on the Dean's List for your outstanding academic performance in the previous semester.

title: EE-101 Circuits Lab Notice
description: All Electrical Engineering students must bring their lab manuals for the circuit synthesis practical session this Wednesday.

title: EE Student Personal Fee Clearance
description: This notice is for STU-999 (EE Student). Please clear your balance at the accounts window before Friday.

title: Compiler Design Project Groups
description: Dear Third Year students (CS-303), project team allocations for the Compiler Design course are uploaded. Please start working on the lexical analyzer stage.
